task_completion.description: Verify the parent location 'West Campus Medical Center' was created.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Snipe-IT Locations list, there should be an entry for 'West Campus Medical Center'.

task_completion.description: Verify the manager for the parent location is set correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Locations list or location details for 'West Campus Medical Center', the Manager column/field should display 'Sarah Chen' or 'schen'.

task_completion.description: Verify the three child locations were created with the correct parent.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Locations list should show 'WC - Emergency Department', 'WC - Radiology Wing', and 'WC - Administrative Offices'. They should visually indicate 'West Campus Medical Center' as their parent location (e.g., in a Parent column or via indentation).

task_completion.description: Verify ASSET-WC01 and ASSET-WC04 were relocated to the Emergency Department.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Assets/Hardware list, the 'Location' or 'Default Location' column for both ASSET-WC01 and ASSET-WC04 must show 'WC - Emergency Department'.

task_completion.description: Verify ASSET-WC02 was relocated to the Radiology Wing.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Assets/Hardware list, the 'Location' or 'Default Location' column for ASSET-WC02 must show 'WC - Radiology Wing'.

task_completion.description: Verify ASSET-WC03 was relocated to the Administrative Offices.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Assets/Hardware list, the 'Location' or 'Default Location' column for ASSET-WC03 must show 'WC - Administrative Offices'.

task_completion.description: Verify no assets remain in the Staging Warehouse.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Locations list, the 'Assets' count for 'Staging Warehouse' should be 0, or filtering the Assets list by 'Staging Warehouse' should yield no results.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent used the Snipe-IT web GUI to complete the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the web browser navigating the Snipe-IT interface, filling out forms, and clicking buttons, rather than terminal windows executing curl or database commands.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent actually entered the data into the application.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should capture the agent typing into the location creation forms and asset edit screens, rather than just showing the final state or modifying the DOM directly.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent did not run external scripts to bypass manual entry.
integrity.visual_evidence: No terminal windows running Python, Bash, or SQL scripts to directly insert locations or update asset records should be visible.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Parent Location: 'West Campus Medical Center'. Manager: 'Sarah Chen' (schen). Child Locations: 'WC - Emergency Department', 'WC - Radiology Wing', 'WC - Administrative Offices'. Asset Assignments: ASSET-WC01 -> 'WC - Emergency Department', ASSET-WC02 -> 'WC - Radiology Wing', ASSET-WC03 -> 'WC - Administrative Offices', ASSET-WC04 -> 'WC - Emergency Department'. The 'Staging Warehouse' must have 0 assets assigned at the end of the task.
